unresolveds: ClaimId collisions: short claim identifiers (c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, a2_c1, a2_c2, a2_c3, a2_c4) are reused across distinct sourceUrls. Disambiguated by sourceUrl, but downstream dedupe/merge should namespace claimIds by sourceId.

All 24 VISITING_STUDENT_PAGE (src_78) claims and the 2 explicit NEGATIVE refusal claims (c3/n1 international exclusion, n2 affiliated-only) were demoted by the reclassifier from PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE / PUBLIC_SAFE_NO_PUBLIC_OPPORTUNITY to HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED. A3 cannot upgrade, but human reviewer should confirm whether the affiliated-LCME-only refusal qualifies for PUBLIC_SAFE_NO_PUBLIC_OPPORTUNITY for the IMG audience.
